topic_title: If / else — writing decision logic in code

source_preflight.detail: 6 nodes (average_rounded, >=90?, grade='A', >=80?, grade='B', elif/else continuation). All labels ≤4 words or concise multi-word. Every node maps to corpus §5.1–§5.3 concepts.

visual_inspection.detail: TB layout correct for if/elif decision tree. Input node blue (#a5d8ff), decision diamonds yellow (#fff3bf), grade results green (#b2f2bb), continuation node purple (#d0bfff). True/False edge labels positioned clearly. Title 'if / elif / else — Grade Assignment' readable at top.

verdict: PASS (cycle 1). 6-node TB flowchart cleanly illustrates if/elif/else branching pattern. Color tiers correct. No visual defects detected.
